payload.answer: Which existing memory should be rewritten, and what should it say instead? The statement “He prefers the other one” is ambiguous without knowing who “he” refers to and what “the other one” is.
repair_options: Choose the existing memory to rewrite and provide the full replacement text.
Clarify who “he” refers to and what “the other one” means before rewriting.
Cancel the rewrite and do not change any memory.
